This is a testharness.js-based test.

  test_feature_availability is not defined
[FAIL] Accelerometer: Permissions-Policy allow='accelerometer' attribute disallows cross-origin relocation
  test_feature_availability is not defined

  test_feature_availability is not defined

  test_feature_availability is not defined
